name: George Serrano
bio: George Serrano is the lead writer and co-founder of Comic Book Clique. Passionate about DC Comics, the Absolute Universe, and the intersection of comics with pop culture.

name: Frank Jarome
bio: Frank Jarome is a contributor to Comic Book Clique, covering major features and exclusive interviews.

name: Jonathan Escudero
bio: Jonathan Escudero covers comic book news for Comic Book Clique, specializing in NYCC coverage and industry announcements.

name: ComicBook Clique
bio: The Comic Book Clique editorial team.
